title: extract_extensions_from_messages regex captures dotted file paths without bound
description:
## Severity
Trivial
## Dimension
complexity
## Location
src/proxy.rs:410-440
## Violation
extract_extensions_from_messages runs a regex over every message text and clones it eagerly: for Text it clones, for Parts it filter_maps and joins. A 1 MB user message triggers O(N) regex over 1 MB. Per-request CPU and memory amplification; the function runs once per request. No cap on total scanned bytes; no early-exit when extensions.len() exceeds a sensible cap.
## Mandated refactor
Cap total scanned text per request (first 64 KiB). Cap unique extensions to top-K via a bounded HashMap. Borrow text instead of cloning.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
